title: Add support for FreeBSD containers
body:
This adds support for basic container lifecycle operations on FreeBSD. The approach taken for this adds container_internal_freebsd.go from my podman prototype (which contains large amounts of code identical or very similar to linux) and iteratively reduces that duplication by moving code from container_internal_linux.go to a new shared file container_internal_common.go. In places where the linux code needs changes to work with FreeBSD, this is tackled by small refactors which are in seperate commits from the code moves.

The stats for the PR are a little daunting in terms of lines of code but functional changes are much smaller and can be found in commits named anything other than "libpod: Move xyz to ...".

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
